supabase.note: Used for: apply_migration, execute_sql, generate_typescript_types, list_tables

context7.note: Used for: library docs lookup (Next.js, Privy, viem, Supabase, Tailwind)

privy-docs.note: Used for: Privy auth docs — embedded wallets, OAuth, token verification

playwright.note: Used for: UI testing, screenshot verification of public pages
playwright.status: optional — enable when doing visual regression testing
